zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏多整理结构
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD处于窄幅震荡格局，价格运行在6.70上方并贴近日内高位，整体呈现弱势偏多整理结构，短线动能有限但未破位下行。

MACD指标略微金叉上方运行但动能柱较弱，RSI缺失但结合价格表现判断为中性偏强，市场缺乏趋势性放量推动，仍以盘整为主。

下方支撑关注6.70及6.68区域，为20日均线与近期低点共振；上方阻力位于6.74突破后或指向6.78至6.80区间。

操作建议短线低吸高抛为主，回踩6.70附近可轻仓介入，止损设6.68下方，目标6.78一线，避免追涨以防假突破风险。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently exhibiting a tight consolidation phase around 6.73, with price action compressed between 6.7183 and 6.7383 over the last 24 hours. The market shows minimal directional bias, with a slight upward drift as price holds near the upper portion of the range. This type of structure typically reflects equilibrium between buyers and sellers following a prior impulse or during low volatility conditions, often preceding a breakout or continuation move once volatility returns.

MACD reading at 0.0219 indicates a modest bullish momentum edge, though the absence of a signal line value limits full convergence analysis. Still, the positive reading suggests buyers retain slight control in the very short term. Meanwhile, price holding above the 20-period SMA at 6.70246 reinforces a mild bullish structural bias. Without RSI confirmation, momentum strength remains partially unverified, but sustained trading above the moving average supports short-term stability.

Immediate resistance is identified at 6.7383, aligned with the 24-hour high, followed by a psychological extension near 6.75. On the downside, initial support sits at 6.7183, with stronger structural support at the SMA20 around 6.70. A break below this level could expose further downside pressure toward the mid-6.60s region, where prior liquidity pockets may attract renewed interest from buyers.

For traders, range strategies remain appropriate, favoring buy-the-dip approaches near 6.70 support and partial profit-taking into resistance. Breakout traders should monitor a decisive close above 6.74 to confirm bullish continuation, ideally supported by expanding volume. Conversely, a breakdown below 6.70 would invalidate the near-term bullish bias and shift focus toward defensive positioning or potential short setups in line with renewed downside momentum.
